title: erigeron elatior
intro: Erigeron elatior, commonly known as tall fleabane or tall daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Erigeron elatior include its ability to support the immune system, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Erigeron elatior can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
